title: Execute disposable-copy E2E flow and fix blockers

requirements: Execute 8 E2E phases: [preflight snapshot, read-only init planning, disposable copy creation, scaffold validation, project rule completion, plan-context smoke checks, rule-section failure-path checks, audit/doctor verification]

Run 4 mandatory Fabric confidence commands before external E2E: [pnpm -r build, pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test, pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/index.test.ts src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/rule-sections.test.ts src/services/audit-log.test.ts src/services/doctor.test.ts src/tools/rule-sections.test.ts, pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared exec vitest run test/agents-meta.test.ts]
Run 2 original-repo read-only commands only: [git status --short, fabric init --plan]
Run 6 disposable-copy protocol commands/actions: [filesystem copy, fabric init --yes, start fabric serve, call planContext, call getRuleSections, run fabric doctor --audit]
Allow a maximum of 10 fix iterations with a summary artifact for each iteration
acceptance: 4 Fabric confidence commands pass before external E2E: verify by exit code 0 for the enumerated build and focused Vitest commands
2 original-repo checks remain read-only: verify by limiting in-place commands to [git status --short, fabric init --plan]

4 disposable-copy scaffold artifacts exist after init: verify by [test -f .fabric/INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md && test -f .fabric/bootstrap/README.md && test -f .fabric/agents.meta.json && test -f .fabric/forensic.json] in the copy

5 representative paths return plan-context output with required fields: verify by checking [revision_hash, selection_token, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, description_index] for each path
4 rule-section failure paths behave correctly: verify by checking hard errors for [missing/expired token, invalid L1 id, required-only id as AI choice, missing ai_selection_reasons]
1 audit compatibility check passes: verify by [fabric doctor --audit] exit code 0 in the disposable copy after rule_selection logging
10 iterations maximum is enforced: verify by counting iteration summaries in .workflow/active/WFS-test-fabric-cognitive-oops-e2e/.summaries/iteration-summaries and stopping at 10

context: Quality gate result controls whether live execution starts
Harness commands and safety split are already documented

shared_context.target_strategy: Use a disposable filesystem copy of /mnt/c/Project/oops-framework for all write-heavy validation
conventions: Never write directly to the original dirty oops-framework repo
Keep the same live server process for token lifecycle scenarios when needed
Fix blockers iteratively and record each cycle in iteration summaries

artifacts.usage: Drive L0-L3 execution and 15 scenario checks
artifacts.contains: layer goals, failure paths, and acceptance criteria

artifacts.usage: Supply the 8-step candidate E2E flow and changed commit surfaces
artifacts.contains: command baselines, target repo shape, and safety notes

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for the candidate E2E flow, commands, and safety notes
Load the L0-L3 analysis and scenario list to drive execution order
Confirm that the quality gate task documents required commands, safety split, and iteration limit
Build the exact command map for local build, focused tests, read-only preflight, disposable-copy init, server smoke calls, and doctor audit
commands: bash(rg 'pnpm -r build|vitest run|fabric init --plan|fabric init --yes|fabric doctor --audit|planContext|getRuleSections' .workflow/active/WFS-test-fabric-cognitive-oops-e2e packages README.md docs -n --max-count 160)

implementation_approach.title: Establish local confidence and safe target entry
implementation_approach.description: Run Fabric build and focused Vitest checks, then perform only read-only preflight commands in the original oops-framework repo.
modification_points: Run 4 Fabric confidence commands: [pnpm -r build, cli test, server vitest, shared vitest]
Run 2 original-repo commands: [git status --short, fabric init --plan]
Capture 1 init branch decision: [init vs reapply behavior]
logic_flow: Inspect the original target repo read-only
Capture the init planning result for downstream copy execution

implementation_approach.title: Execute disposable-copy scaffold and service smoke
implementation_approach.description: Create a filesystem copy, run write-heavy init there, then start the built server and call planContext for the representative target paths.
modification_points: Run 6 copy-side actions: [filesystem copy, fabric init --yes, verify 4 artifacts, start fabric serve, call planContext, collect required output fields]
Validate 5 representative target paths: [README.md, assets/script/Main.ts, assets/script/game/initialize/Initialize.ts, assets/script/game/common/config/GameUIConfig.ts, doc/using.md]
Check 5 required plan-context fields: [revision_hash, selection_token, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, description_index]
logic_flow: Create a disposable copy of the dirty target repo
Run init in the copy according to the plan result
Start the server and smoke-test plan-context across 5 paths

implementation_approach.title: Run rule-section, audit, and doctor protocol checks
implementation_approach.description: Exercise valid and invalid getRuleSections flows, verify rule_selection audit events, and confirm fabric doctor --audit accepts the protocol.
modification_points: Validate 4 failure paths: [missing/expired token, invalid L1 id, required-only id as AI choice, missing ai_selection_reasons]
Validate 1 audit flow: [rule_selection written before fabric doctor --audit]
logic_flow: Use valid L1 selections for success-path rule-section retrieval
Check audit logging and doctor compatibility

implementation_approach.title: Iterate on blockers within the test-fix limit
implementation_approach.description: Fix blockers discovered during execution and repeat the affected checks until success or until the maximum iteration count is reached.
modification_points: Write 1 summary artifact per iteration under .workflow/active/WFS-test-fabric-cognitive-oops-e2e/.summaries/iteration-summaries
Stop after 1 terminal condition: [all acceptance checks pass or iteration 10 reached]
logic_flow: Apply the minimal fix needed for the failing validation surface
Record outcome and continue until pass or limit

test_commands.run_tests: pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/index.test.ts src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/rule-sections.test.ts src/services/audit-log.test.ts src/services/doctor.test.ts src/tools/rule-sections.test.ts && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared exec vitest run test/agents-meta.test.ts
test_commands.run_coverage: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/index.test.ts src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/rule-sections.test.ts src/services/audit-log.test.ts src/services/doctor.test.ts src/tools/rule-sections.test.ts --coverage
